_description: Home Page Content - MARELUNE BALI CMS
_affects: HANYA homepage - tidak affect page lain
_seoNote: Title dan Description untuk meta tags - tidak muncul di page visual
title: Marelune Bali - Private Yacht Agency
description: Book private yacht journeys across Bali with curated routes, premium hospitality, and fast WhatsApp confirmation.
_heroNote: Hero Section - Gambar besar di atas page dengan text overlay

hero._imageTip: Gunakan gambar landscape high quality, minimal 1920x1080px
hero.title: MARELUNE
hero.subtitle: Private yacht journeys across Bali, curated for quiet luxury, clear water, and moments worth keeping.

_trustNote: Trust Bar - Social proof elements di bawah hero

trust._ratingTip: Rating berdasarkan review tamu. Bisa dari Google, TripAdvisor, dll
trust.text: Trusted planning experience for couples, families, and private groups.
trust._avatarsTip: Foto kecil bulat yang merepresentasikan guest types. 3 foto ideal.
trust._partnersTip: Kata kunci yang menunjukkan partner/trust signals

_introNote: Editorial Statement - Headline utama yang ingin diutamakan

intro.title: Since every sea day should feel personal, Marelune designs Bali yacht journeys around your timing, mood, and occasion.
intro.body: From Nusa Penida day trips to calm sunset charters in Nusa Dua, every request is handled with clear options, fast confirmation, and a premium first impression before guests ever step onboard.

_statsNote: Stats Cards - Angka besar dengan image background untuk visual impact

stats.label: Core Bali Routes
stats._imageTip: Background image untuk stat card ini

_journeySectionNote: Section heading untuk Journey showcase di bawah

journeySection.title: Explore Bali's most requested private yacht routes
journeySection.body: Cinematic route pages built to sell the experience first, then move qualified guests into booking.

_stepsNote: How It Works - 4 steps booking process

stepsSection.title: Your dream journey in four simple steps
stepsSection.body: A simple booking flow that keeps the experience premium without adding friction.

_stepsListTip: 4 langkah booking process - step numbers harus unique (01, 02, 03, 04)

steps.title: Discuss Vision
steps.text: Share your date, guest count, preferred route, and occasion.

steps.title: We Plan
steps.text: Marelune suggests the best yacht tier, timing, and route setup.

steps.title: Confirm Trip
steps.text: Availability, package details, and payment instructions are confirmed by WhatsApp.

steps.title: Begin Journey
steps.text: Arrive with the details already handled and the onboard mood already shaped.

servicesSection.title: Curated travel services for every journey
servicesSection.body: Each service is written for both user trust and future CMS control.
servicesSection._categoriesTip: Tab labels untuk filter services. Max 4 tabs recommended.

_servicesListTip: Service cards dengan images. category value harus match dengan categories di atas.

services.title: Private Charter Planning
services.text: Route, tide window, yacht tier, and guest flow are matched before the booking is confirmed.
services._metaTip: Meta info yang muncul di card. 3 items ideal.

services.title: Proposal and Celebration Setup
services.text: Birthday, proposal, honeymoon, and family moments can be shaped with the right onboard details.

services.title: Island Concierge Support
services.text: Marelune helps reduce decision fatigue with departure guidance, guest notes, and simple next steps.

services.title: Content-Friendly Sea Days
services.text: For creators, honeymooners, and brands who need scenery, timing, and photo stops to feel intentional.

_whyNote: Why Choose Us Section - Feature grid dengan icons

whySection.title: Why travelers choose Marelune every time
whySection.body: Trust signals that should stay visible without making the homepage feel busy.

_whyListTip: 6 items dalam 2-column grid. Images harus kecil (88x74px ideal).

why.title: Expert Guidance
why.text: Bali-specific route advice before guests commit.

why.title: Fast Support
why.text: Leads move quickly into WhatsApp follow-up.

why.title: Private Journeys
why.text: The trip is framed around guest mood and occasion.

why.title: Flexible Plans
why.text: Routes can adapt around timing and sea conditions.

why.title: Global Reach
why.text: English-first content makes international guests feel understood.

why.title: Safe Booking Flow
why.text: The website captures details before manual confirmation.

_testimonialsNote: Testimonials - Social proof quotes dari past guests

testimonialsSection.title: What our happy travelers say
testimonialsSection.body: Short, high-trust social proof near the booking decision.

_testimonialsListTip: 2-3 testimonials ideal. Photos harus genuine - real guests lebih convincing.

testimonials.quote: The route felt calm, private, and beautifully prepared. We did not have to overthink the details.
testimonials.name: Michelle Tan

testimonials.quote: The planning flow was simple and fast. The team helped us choose the right timing for our group.
testimonials.name: Arman Lee

journalSection.title: New adventures and travel tips daily
journalSection.body: A clean editorial section that supports SEO without making the homepage feel like a blog archive.

_faqNote: FAQ Section - Accordion-style Q&A untuk pre-booking questions

faqSection.title: Everything you need to know
faqSection.body: Useful answers before a guest sends a booking request.

_faqListTip: 4-6 FAQ items ideal. Questions harus actual questions yang guest sering ask.

faq.question: How do I book?
faq.answer: Submit the request form with your preferred date, route, and guest count. The Marelune team will follow up on WhatsApp.

faq.question: Can the route be customized?
faq.answer: Yes. Route, timing, onboard mood, yacht tier, and celebration setup can be adjusted after consultation.

faq.question: Is payment handled on the website?
faq.answer: Not yet. The website captures qualified leads, then the team confirms availability and payment instructions manually.

faq.question: Which route should I choose?
faq.answer: Nusa Penida is best for scenery, Nusa Dua for shorter sunset moments, and Gili for a longer blue-water escape.

_newsletterNote: Newsletter Section - Email subscription dengan background image

newsletter._imageTip: Background image untuk newsletter section. Sebaiknya ocean/sunset themed.
newsletter.title: STAY UPDATED
newsletter.body: Receive new Bali yacht guides, route notes, and quiet-luxury travel ideas.
